examples.title: Earth Location
examples.content: A city on Earth: 6371 km from center, 45°E longitude, 30°N latitude. Spherical (6371, 45°, 30°) describes it.

examples.title: Atom Electron
examples.content: An electron orbits at r=1 Bohr radius, angle θ, angle φ. Spherical coordinates natural for atomic physics.

examples.title: Satellite
examples.content: Satellite 400 km above Earth, at longitude 60°W, latitude 45°N. Spherical (6771, 300°, 45°) pin-points it.
